title: stelis pilulosa
intro: Stelis pilulosa, also known as the pineapple orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis pilulosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it effective against bacterial and fungal infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
